rows.label: tev016801_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Huh? You want to know
why I'm waiting in line?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016801_MSG0002
rows.name:
You mean you don't even
know who she is?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016801_MSG0003
rows.name:
She's an angel! The only
beautiful flower that ever
bloomed on this miserable world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016801_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've been waiting in line all morning
just for a chance to speak with her![ST:wait ]
